2605.11989.title: A Transfer Learning Evaluation of Deep Neural Networks for Image Classification
2605.11989.paper_summary: Transfer learning is a machine learning technique that uses previously acquired knowledge from a source domain to enhance learning in a target domain by reusing learned weights. This technique is ubiquitous because of its great advantages in achieving high performance while saving training time, memory, and effort in network design. In this paper, we investigate how to select the best pre-trained model that meets the target domain requirements for image classification tasks. In our study, we refined the output layers and general network parameters to apply the knowledge of eleven image processing models, pre-trained on ImageNet, to five different target domain datasets. We measured the accuracy, accuracy density, training time, and model size to evaluate the pre-trained models both in training sessions in one episode and with ten episodes.
2605.11989.paper_summary_zh: 轉移學習是一種機器學習技術，它利用從源領域獲得的先前知識來增強目標領域的學習，通過重用已學習的權重。這種技術無處不在，因為它在實現高性能的同時節省了訓練時間、內存和網絡設計的努力。在本文中，我們研究如何選擇最符合目標領域要求的最佳預訓練模型，以用於圖像分類任務。在我們的研究中，我們精煉了輸出層和一般網絡參數，以將在ImageNet上預訓練的十一個圖像處理模型的知識應用於五個不同的目標領域數據集。我們測量了準確率、準確率密度、訓練時間和模型大小，以評估預訓練模型在一次訓練會話和十次訓練會話中的表現。
2605.11989.author: Nermeen Abou Baker et.al.
2605.11989.authors: Nermeen Abou Baker, Nico Zengeler, Uwe Handmann
